steps.title: Use the material-object clue
steps.content: The next sentence explains the kind of evidence needed: only material objects, such as fossil remains, can show whether a Pliocene idea is defensible. The blank must mean tangible or material.

steps.title: Reject the wrong qualities
steps.content: Choice B means easy to use. Choice C means imaginative. Choice D means not settling a question. None of those matches the material evidence described by fossils. The answer is A.
